description_long: This figure depicts a highly stylized humanoid adult with exaggerated, elongated limbs and a slender, contorted body. The head is smooth and featureless, resembling a mannequin or a mask, and the arms extend into sharp, blade-like appendages. The upper body is clad in a tight, fitted garment with a high collar, while the lower body features loose, modern pants with visible seams and pockets. The legs are bent in a dynamic, almost predatory pose, and the feet are covered with athletic, high-top footwear. The overall appearance is both futuristic and unsettling, with a blend of organic and mechanical design elements.
description: A stylized humanoid adult with elongated limbs, a featureless head, and blade-like arms, dressed in fitted upperwear and loose modern pants with athletic footwear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the featureless head, contorted torso, and extended blade-like arms with visible upper body details.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extreme length and curvature of the limbs, as well as the profile of the head and the layered clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the upper garment's fit, and the dynamic bend of the legs.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view emphasizing the twisted posture, the sharpness of the arm extensions, and the structure of the pants and footwear.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted long-sleeve top and loose modern pants with high-top athletic footwear
attribute_posture: dynamic, crouched, and contorted with arms extended outward
